references.hebrew: וְנָשָׂ֜אתָ הַמָּשָׁ֥ל הַזֶּ֛ה עַל־מֶ֥לֶךְ בָּבֶ֖ל וְאָמָ֑רְתָּ אֵ֚יךְ שָׁבַ֣ת נֹגֵ֔שׂ שָׁבְתָ֖ה מַדְהֵבָֽה׃
references.english:
you shall recite this song of scorn over the king of Babylon:
How is the taskmaster vanished,
How is oppressioncoppression Reading marhebah with 1QIsᵃ (cf. Septuagint). The traditional reading madhebah is of unknown meaning. ended!

references.hebrew: אַ֥ךְ אִ֛ישׁ אַל־יָרֵ֖ב וְאַל־יוֹכַ֣ח אִ֑ישׁ וְעַמְּךָ֖ כִּמְרִיבֵ֥י כֹהֵֽן׃
references.english:
“Let no one rebuke; let no one protest!”
For this, your people has a grievance against [you], O priest!aFor this, your people has a grievance against [you], O priest! For failing to reprove; but meaning of Heb. uncertain.

references.hebrew: שָׂבַ֤עְתָּ קָלוֹן֙ מִכָּב֔וֹד שְׁתֵ֥ה גַם־אַ֖תָּה וְהֵעָרֵ֑ל תִּסּ֣וֹב עָלֶ֗יךָ כּ֚וֹס יְמִ֣ין יְהֹוָ֔ה וְקִיקָל֖וֹן עַל־כְּבוֹדֶֽךָ׃
references.english:
You shall be sated with shame
Rather than glory:
Drink in your turn and stagger!ostagger Emendation yields “uncover yourself”; cf. Lam. 4.21.
The cup in GOD’s right hand
Shall come around to you,
And disgrace topdisgrace to Or “vomit of disgrace upon.” your glory.

references.hebrew: כִּ֤י ׀ לֹ֤א אֵֽל־חָפֵ֘ץ־רֶ֥שַׁע ׀ אָ֑תָּה לֹ֖א יְגֻרְךָ֣ רָֽע׃
references.english:
For You are not a God who desires wickedness;
evil cannot abide with You;
references.matched_snippet: כי לא אל חפץ רשע אתה לא יגורך רע

commentary_links.hebrew: אֵ֛יךְ נָפַ֥לְתָּ מִשָּׁמַ֖יִם הֵילֵ֣ל בֶּן־שָׁ֑חַר נִגְדַּ֣עְתָּ לָאָ֔רֶץ חוֹלֵ֖שׁ עַל־גּוֹיִֽם׃
commentary_links.english:
How are you fallen from heaven,
O Shining One, son of Dawn!dShining One, son of Dawn A character in some lost myth.
How are you felled to earth,
O vanquisher of nations!
commentary_links.matched_snippet: דכתיב איך נפלת משמים הילל בן שחר

commentary_links.hebrew: כׇּל־מַלְכֵ֥י גוֹיִ֖ם כֻּלָּ֑ם שָׁכְב֥וּ בְכָב֖וֹד אִ֥ישׁ בְּבֵיתֽוֹ׃
commentary_links.english:
All the kings of nations
Were laid, every one, in honorhWho never released … in honor Emendation yields “Who chained to his palace gate / All the kings of nations? / Yet they were all laid in honor…” The practice of chaining captive chieftains to gates is attested in Mesopotamia.
Each in his tomb;
commentary_links.matched_snippet: נגדעת לארץ חולש על גוים וגו אמר רבה בר

commentary_links.english:
All the earth is calm, untroubled;
Loudly it cheers.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: כל ימיו של אותו רשע לא נמצא שחוק בפי כל בריה שנאמר נחה שקטה כל

commentary_links.hebrew: וְרָבְצוּ־שָׁ֣ם צִיִּ֔ים וּמָלְא֥וּ בָתֵּיהֶ֖ם אֹחִ֑ים וְשָׁ֤כְנוּ שָׁם֙ בְּנ֣וֹת יַעֲנָ֔ה וּשְׂעִירִ֖ים יְרַקְּדוּ־שָֽׁם׃
commentary_links.english:
But beastsgbeasts Meaning of Heb. uncertain. shall lie down there,
And the houses be filled with owls;howls Meaning of Heb. uncertain.
There shall ostriches make their home,
And there shall satyrs dance.

commentary_links.hebrew: ה֚וֹי מַשְׁקֵ֣ה רֵעֵ֔הוּ מְסַפֵּ֥חַ חֲמָתְךָ֖ וְאַ֣ף שַׁכֵּ֑ר לְמַ֥עַן הַבִּ֖יט עַל־מְעוֹרֵיהֶֽם׃ שָׂבַ֤עְתָּ קָלוֹן֙ מִכָּב֔וֹד שְׁתֵ֥ה גַם־אַ֖תָּה וְהֵעָרֵ֑ל תִּסּ֣וֹב עָלֶ֗יךָ כּ֚וֹס יְמִ֣ין יְהֹוָ֔ה וְקִיקָל֖וֹן עַל־כְּבוֹדֶֽךָ׃
commentary_links.english:
Ah, you who make others drink to intoxication
As you pour outmAs you pour out Meaning of Heb. uncertain. Emendation yields “from the bowl of.” your wrath,
In order to gaze upon their nakedness!nnakedness Cf. Gen. 9.21–22. You shall be sated with shame
Rather than glory:
Drink in your turn and stagger!ostagger Emendation yields “uncover yourself”; cf. Lam. 4.21.
The cup in GOD’s right hand
Shall come around to you,
And disgrace topdisgrace to Or “vomit of disgrace upon.” your glory.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: יכון &star אלא מהכא שבעת קלון מכבוד שתה

commentary_links.hebrew: כֻּלָּ֣ם יַעֲנ֔וּ וְיֹאמְר֖וּ אֵלֶ֑יךָ גַּם־אַתָּ֛ה חֻלֵּ֥יתָ כָמ֖וֹנוּ אֵלֵ֥ינוּ נִמְשָֽׁלְתָּ׃
commentary_links.english:
All speak up and say to you,
“So you have been stricken as we were,
You have become like us!
commentary_links.matched_snippet: כמונו אלינו נמשלת יצתה בת קול ואמרה ממי נעמת רדה והשכבה את ערלים

commentary_links.english: Whom do you surpass in beauty? Down with you, and be laid to rest with the uncircumcised!
commentary_links.matched_snippet: כמונו אלינו נמשלת יצתה בת קול ואמרה ממי נעמת רדה והשכבה את ערלים

commentary_links.hebrew: כִּ֤י ׀ לֹ֤א אֵֽל־חָפֵ֘ץ־רֶ֥שַׁע ׀ אָ֑תָּה לֹ֖א יְגֻרְךָ֣ רָֽע׃
commentary_links.english:
For You are not a God who desires wickedness;
evil cannot abide with You;
commentary_links.matched_snippet: וכתיב כי לא אל חפץ רשע אתה לא יגורך רע

commentary_links.hebrew: גַּ֤ם עֲנ֣וֹשׁ לַצַּדִּ֣יק לֹא־ט֑וֹב לְהַכּ֖וֹת נְדִיבִ֣ים עַל־יֹֽשֶׁר׃
commentary_links.english:
To punish an innocent is surely not right,
Or to flog the great for their uprightness.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: ענוש לצדיק לא טוב אין לא טוב אלא רע

commentary_links.hebrew: שָׂבַ֤עְתָּ קָלוֹן֙ מִכָּב֔וֹד שְׁתֵ֥ה גַם־אַ֖תָּה וְהֵעָרֵ֑ל תִּסּ֣וֹב עָלֶ֗יךָ כּ֚וֹס יְמִ֣ין יְהֹוָ֔ה וְקִיקָל֖וֹן עַל־כְּבוֹדֶֽךָ׃
commentary_links.english:
You shall be sated with shame
Rather than glory:
Drink in your turn and stagger!ostagger Emendation yields “uncover yourself”; cf. Lam. 4.21.
The cup in GOD’s right hand
Shall come around to you,
And disgrace topdisgrace to Or “vomit of disgrace upon.” your glory.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: יכון &star אלא מהכא שבעת קלון מכבוד שתה

commentary_links.hebrew: אַ֥ךְ אִ֛ישׁ אַל־יָרֵ֖ב וְאַל־יוֹכַ֣ח אִ֑ישׁ וְעַמְּךָ֖ כִּמְרִיבֵ֥י כֹהֵֽן׃
commentary_links.english:
“Let no one rebuke; let no one protest!”
For this, your people has a grievance against [you], O priest!aFor this, your people has a grievance against [you], O priest! For failing to reprove; but meaning of Heb. uncertain.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: הואיל וכתיב ועמך כמריבי כהן אפילו מנות

commentary_links.hebrew: לֹֽא־יֵשֵׁ֨ב ׀ בְּקֶ֥רֶב בֵּיתִי֮ עֹשֵׂ֢ה רְמִ֫יָּ֥ה דֹּבֵ֥ר שְׁקָרִ֑ים לֹא־יִ֝כּ֗וֹן לְנֶ֣גֶד עֵינָֽי׃
commentary_links.english:
One who deals deceitfully
shall not live in my house;
one who speaks untruth
shall not stand before my eyes.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: &star וכדברי בית הלל אף משום רב ית &star אי הכי בניו ובני

commentary_links.hebrew: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר יְהֹוָ֗ה מִ֤י יְפַתֶּה֙ אֶת־אַחְאָ֔ב וְיַ֕עַל וְיִפֹּ֖ל בְּרָמֹ֣ת גִּלְעָ֑ד וַיֹּ֤אמֶר זֶה֙ בְּכֹ֔ה וְזֶ֥ה אֹמֵ֖ר בְּכֹֽה׃ וַיֵּצֵ֣א הָר֗וּחַ וַֽיַּעֲמֹד֙ לִפְנֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֔ה וַיֹּ֖אמֶר אֲנִ֣י אֲפַתֶּ֑נּוּ וַיֹּ֧אמֶר יְהֹוָ֛ה אֵלָ֖יו בַּמָּֽה׃ וַיֹּ֗אמֶר אֵצֵא֙ וְהָיִ֙יתִי֙ ר֣וּחַ שֶׁ֔קֶר בְּפִ֖י כׇּל־נְבִיאָ֑יו וַיֹּ֗אמֶר תְּפַתֶּה֙ וְגַם־תּוּכָ֔ל צֵ֖א וַעֲשֵׂה־כֵֽן׃
commentary_links.english: G<small>OD</small> asked, ‘Who will entice Ahab so that he will march and fall at Ramoth-gilead?’ Then one said thus and another said thus, until a certain spirit came forward and stood before G<small>OD</small> and said, ‘I will entice him.’ ‘How?’ G<small>OD</small> asked him. And he replied, ‘I will go out and be a lying spirit in the mouth of all his prophets.’ Then [God] said, ‘You will entice and you will prevail. Go out and do it.’
commentary_links.matched_snippet: אפתנו וגו ויאמר אצא והייתי רוח שקר בפי

commentary_links.hebrew: וְנָשָׂ֜אתָ הַמָּשָׁ֥ל הַזֶּ֛ה עַל־מֶ֥לֶךְ בָּבֶ֖ל וְאָמָ֑רְתָּ אֵ֚יךְ שָׁבַ֣ת נֹגֵ֔שׂ שָׁבְתָ֖ה מַדְהֵבָֽה׃
commentary_links.english:
you shall recite this song of scorn over the king of Babylon:
How is the taskmaster vanished,
How is oppressioncoppression Reading marhebah with 1QIsᵃ (cf. Septuagint). The traditional reading madhebah is of unknown meaning. ended!

commentary_links.english: G<small>OD</small> asked, ‘Who will entice Ahab so that he will march and fall at Ramoth-gilead?’ Then one said thus and another said thus,
commentary_links.matched_snippet: ויפול ברמות גלעד ויאמר זה בכה וזה אמר
